title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup to v1.7.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| rollup | devDependencies | minor | [`1.6.0` -> `1.7.0`](https://diff.intrinsic.com/rollup/1.6.0/1.7.0) | [source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup</summary>

### [`v1.7.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​170)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.6.1...v1.7.0)

_2019-03-20_

##### Features

-   Sort chunk exports by name for greater consistency ([#​2757](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2757))

##### Bug Fixes

-   Fix a situation where tree-shakeable code would not be removed in an indeterminate manner ([#​2757](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2757))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2757](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2757): Sort modules before binding, sort exports ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.6.1`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​161)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.6.0...v1.6.1)

_2019-03-20_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Avoid name clashes of unused default exports when tree-shaking is false ([#​2758](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2758))
-   Do not crash when generating SystemJS bundles containing array patterns with member expressions ([#​2760](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2760))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2758](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2758): Make sure unused default exports are deconflicted when tree-shaking is false ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2760](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2760): Handle member expressions in array patterns ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

</details>
